title: Astral Arise RP
description: A Space meets fantasy modpack for the FIUTIU smp.
body:
*When a fallen starship changed everything*

### ✨ Universe

What happens when something new breaks the status quo? What began as a classic fantasy realm of   dragons fairies and dungeons has evolved into something much more: a world where ancient magic meets technology, where heroes now dream of reaching the stars like the legends described who achieved *The First Climb* to Myrelune.

After that monumental achievement, progress stagnated. Society became so focused on celebrating and promoting the Myrelune landing to "inspire the next generation" that each generation simply waited for the next one to take the actual leap. The tools exist, the knowledge is here, but the ambition has been passed down like a torch no one wants to light.

Astral Arise drops you into this world of ambitious innovation, where every player's story contributes to humanity's next great leap. Whether you're a spell-sword uncovering alien artifacts, a mechanical engineer building rocket-powered contraptions, or a dragon rider exploring both mystical realms and distant planets, this is fantasy evolved beyond its earthly limits.

---

###  🚀 **What To Expect**

 ⚔️ **Empowering Roleplay**
Master traditional fantasy roles with cosmic ambitions through **comprehensive class systems** ([Paladins](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests), [Rogues](https://modrinth.com/mod/rogues-and-warriors), [Berserker](https://modrinth.com/mod/berserker-rpg-class), [Forcemaster](https://modrinth.com/mod/forcemaster-rpg-class), **More RPG Classes**):
- Paladins wielding both holy magic and advanced technology
- Rogues infiltrating ancient dungeons and alien installations  
- Berserkers channeling primal fury enhanced by mysterious artifacts
- Forcemasters manipulating energy both magical and technological
- Spell casters using [Iron's Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) with power sources both ancient and powerful

 🐉 **Empowering Discovery**
Command dragons through [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons), explore with [familiars](https://modrinth.com/mod/alshanexs-familiars) (Alshanex Familiars), and encounter creatures that blur the line between magical beast and cosmic entity. [Mowzie's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/mowzies-mobs) adds unique creatures while [Friends and Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes-forge) expands the world's inhabitants.

🌌 **Multi-Planetary Exploration**
Venture beyond Elarin with [Stellaris](https://modrinth.com/mod/stellaris) integration:
- Establish bases on Jundarok and Umbryss
- Explore the mystical **Eternal Starlight** dimension
- Pilot aircraft between worlds and dimensions ([Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft))
- Treat space as "the ultimate dungeon" with infinite possibilities.

⚙️ **Empowering the Smart Stuff!**
Build the future with [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mechanical systems and expansions (Create: Central Kitchen, Create: Enchantment Industry, Create Stuff & Additions):
- Steam-powered factories and transportation networks
- Complex machinery that bridges magic and technology
- Rocket components and space-age contraptions
- Dragon-compatible transportation systems

---

 🏘️ **Empowering Creatives**

 🎬 **Immersive Tools**
- Professional photography [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) and camera systems ([CMDCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/cmdcam)) for documenting adventures
- ([Custom Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)) for authentic character representation
- Voice chat ([Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)) with proximity features for immersive communication

 🏗️ **World Building & Base Design**
Extensive furniture and decoration options ([Another Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture), [Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)) let you build everything from medieval taverns to futuristic research stations. [Sophisticated storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) and Create integration support both magical workshops and high-tech laboratories.

 🗣️ **Social**
- [Talk bubbles](https://modrinth.com/mod/talkbubbles) and [immersive messaging](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-messages-api) systems
- [Easy NPC](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc) creation for story-driven servers

---

 🌍 **Rich World Content**

 🏛️ **Dungeons & Structures**
Explore enhanced ancient dungeons that may hide technological secrets, massive generated structures (Structory) from multiple eras, and discover whether those ruins are magical temples or forgotten research facilities.

🌿 **Living Environments**
Experience seasonal weather (Serene Seasons), dynamic biomes(Biomes O' Plenty), and immersive ambiance(Ambient Sounds) that responds to both magical and technological influence. The world feels alive whether you're in enchanted forests or on alien planets.

 🎯 **Epic Challenges**
Face custom bosses (Mowzie's Mobs), enhanced trial chambers (Not Enough Trials), and large-scale adventures.

---

 ⚡ **Optimized Performance**

Built for smooth roleplay events and community gatherings with performance mods that ensure your epic moments aren't interrupted. (Or we're trying!)

---

 📋 **Quick Details**

**🎯 Perfect For:** Roleplay communities, creative builders, space exploration enthusiasts, and anyone wanting evolved fantasy gameplay

**👥 Recommended: 2-20+ players | Solo exploration to community servers

💻 Requirements: Minecraft 1.21.1 | NeoForge 21.1.200 | 6GB+ RAM recommended

🌟 Core Mods: Stellaris, Iron's Spellbooks, Create, Ice and Fire, RPG Class Systems, Immersive Aircraft

---

*The crashed ship changed everything. Now it's your turn to reach for the stars.*

<summary>Permissions</summary>
